pra-ṇu (√nu) P. Ā. -navati, ˚te, to roar, bellow, sound, reverberate,  RV. ;  AV. ;
P. -ṇauti, to make a humming or droning sound;
(esp.) to utter the syllable om,  Br. ;  ChUp. ;  ŚrS.
